modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help backing up BitLocker recovery key on Windows.

full_description_text:  
User wants to back up their BitLocker recovery key.  
They are using Windows.  
Not sure how to do it.  
Need guidance on the backup process.
